# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class ProductSearchController extends Controller
{
    public function search(Request $request)
    {
        $q = trim((string) $request->input('q', ''));
        $categoryIds = $request->input('category_ids', []);
        $categoryId = $request->input('category_id', null);
        $minPrice = $request->input('min_price', null);
        $maxPrice = $request->input('max_price', null);
        $sort = (string) $request->input('sort', 'relevance');
        $direction = strtolower((string) $request->input('direction', 'desc')) === 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';
        $perPage = (int) $request->input('per_page', 24);
        $perPage = max(1, min(100, $perPage));

        if (!is_array($categoryIds)) {
            $categoryIds = array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(',', (string) $categoryIds)), 'strlen');
        }

        if ($categoryId !== null && $categoryId !== '') {
            $categoryIds[] = $categoryId;
        }

        $categoryIds = array_values(array_unique(array_filter(array_map('intval', $categoryIds), fn($v) => $v > 0)));

        $minPrice = is_numeric($minPrice) ? (float) $minPrice : null;
        $maxPrice = is_numeric($maxPrice) ? (float) $maxPrice : null;

        if ($minPrice !== null && $maxPrice !== null && $minPrice > $maxPrice) {
            [$minPrice, $maxPrice] = [$maxPrice, $minPrice];
        }

        $bindings = [];
        $where = ['p.is_active = 1'];

        $joins = [];
        $joins[] = 'LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id';

        $select = [
            'p.id',
            'p.sku',
            'p.name',
            'p.slug',
            'p.category_id',
            'c.name AS category_name',
            'p.price',
            'p.compare_at_price',
            'p.currency',
            'p.stock',
            'p.rating',
            'p.rating_count',
            'p.created_at',
            'p.updated_at',
        ];

        $rankExpr = '0';
        $orderBy = [];

        if ($q !== '') {
            $qNorm = mb_strtolower($q, 'UTF-8');
            $like = '%' . str_replace(['\\', '%', '_'], ['\\\\', '\\%', '\\_'], $qNorm) . '%';

            $where[] = '(LOWER(p.name) LIKE ? OR LOWER(p.sku) LIKE ? OR LOWER(c.name) LIKE ?)';
            $bindings[] = $like;
            $bindings[] = $like;
            $bindings[] = $like;

            $rankExpr = '(CASE
                WHEN LOWER(p.name) = ? THEN 100
                WHEN LOWER(p.name) LIKE ? THEN 60
                WHEN LOWER(p.sku) = ? THEN 55
                WHEN LOWER(p.sku) LIKE ? THEN 35
                WHEN LOWER(c.name) LIKE ? THEN 15
                ELSE 0
            END)';
            $bindings[] = $qNorm;
            $bindings[] = $like;
            $bindings[] = $qNorm;
            $bindings[] = $like;
            $bindings[] = $like;

            $select[] = DB::raw($rankExpr . ' AS relevance');
        } else {
            $select[] = DB::raw('0 AS relevance');
        }

        if (!empty($categoryIds)) {
            $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($categoryIds), '?'));
            $where[] = 'p.category_id IN (' . $placeholders . ')';
            foreach ($categoryIds as $id) {
                $bindings[] = $id;
            }
        }

        if ($minPrice !== null) {
            $where[] = 'p.price >= ?';
            $bindings[] = $minPrice;
        }

        if ($maxPrice !== null) {
            $where[] = 'p.price <= ?';
            $bindings[] = $maxPrice;
        }

        $allowedSorts = [
            'relevance',
            'price',
            'name',
            'newest',
            'rating',
        ];

        if (!in_array($sort, $allowedSorts, true)) {
            $sort = 'relevance';
        }

        if ($sort === 'relevance') {
            if ($q !== '') {
                $orderBy[] = 'relevance DESC';
                $orderBy[] = 'p.stock > 0 DESC';
                $orderBy[] = 'p.updated_at DESC';
            } else {
                $orderBy[] = 'p.stock > 0 DESC';
                $orderBy[] = 'p.updated_at DESC';
            }
        } elseif ($sort === 'price') {
            $orderBy[] = 'p.price ' . $direction;
            $orderBy[] = 'p.id DESC';
        } elseif ($sort === 'name') {
            $orderBy[] = 'p.name ' . $direction;
            $orderBy[] = 'p.id DESC';
        } elseif ($sort === 'newest') {
            $orderBy[] = 'p.created_at ' . $direction;
            $orderBy[] = 'p.id DESC';
        } elseif ($sort === 'rating') {
            $orderBy[] = 'p.rating ' . $direction;
            $orderBy[] = 'p.rating_count DESC';
            $orderBy[] = 'p.id DESC';
        }

        $sql = 'SELECT ' . implode(', ', $select) . '
                FROM products p
                ' . implode("\n", $joins) . '
                WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where) . '
                ORDER BY ' . implode(', ', $orderBy);

        $baseQuery = DB::query()->from(DB::raw('(' . $sql . ') AS t'))->setBindings($bindings);

        return $baseQuery->paginate($perPage);
    }
}
